body_txt: The Mole sent to gain the trust of a specific person... horizontally. Usually female, sometimes even a heroic Fake Defector , the uniting thread is that there is one target and this one target is to be seduced. The others might be suspicious or even hostile, but that's incidental. When this is used in espionage, in which the trapper gains secrets from the victim, the classic perpetrator is the Femme Fatale Spy , although the role is not quite Always Female . Male examples may target women or gay men, or be Disguised in Drag to seduce a straight man. note Truth in Television , with one such case inspiring the play and movie M. Butterfly . In the latter scenario, the usual tropes about glamorous female spies will probably appear to be played straight... until the Unsettling Gender-Reveal . This can also be used for Blackmail purposes, when a sexy woman approaches a wealthy married man and gets him into a compromising position (preferably in bed, though in some cases just a passionate embrace will do), while her partner-in-crime secretly takes pictures. Then the pictures are sent to the man with a demand for money; no money, and the wife gets sent copies of everything. A male version may seduce an Armored Closet Gay target for additional blackmail fodder. There are plenty of variations, but they all rely on using sex as bait to get someone to do something unwise, then making them regret it. Some works, especially older ones, call this a " badger game ". Also the name of special computers made to appear as desirable targets (typically governments or large corporations); used by cybercrime investigators for trapping playful hackers and crackers to learn their techniques. Standard territory of The Vamp , the Femme Fatale ( Spy spy or otherwise), or the Shady Lady of the Night . If it's being performed by a policewoman to catch criminals, it's more likely a Dirty Harriet . This is #31 of The Thirty-Six Stratagems , and thus one of The Oldest Tricks in the Book . May involve The Schlub Pub Seduction Deduction and/or Nudity as a Bribe . See also Go Seduce My Archnemesis and Chained to a Bed . For Lighter and Softer variations, see I Have Boobs, You Must Obey! and Favors for the Sexy . In the other direction, compare Literal Maneater - where this strategy is used so she can devour the guy - and Psychosexual Horror . Not to be confused with the Innocent Innuendo that is Agent Provocateur ; that job is actually very, very unsexy. Also has nothing to do with literal honey traps for capturing wasps.
